warnings: All ledger items reflect MET observations. EVL/TPA/CDE/SEL/GOV remain canonical owners; this artifact does not adopt, accept, or activate any candidate.
current_state values describe artifact-backed observations only. Without canonical-owner artifacts confirming materialization, items remain proposed/open or surface as stale_candidate_signal.
Unknown age remains unknown when the source candidate has no created_at.
failure_prevented: MET-created candidates and signal inputs accumulating as a stale suggestion pile that no canonical owner ever closed, with no MET artifact naming which item went stale, when, and what input would close it.
signal_improved: Each candidate, signal input, fallback reduction item, and replay/lineage hardening item is tracked with current_state, age_days, stale_after_days, and the next_recommended_input that would close it; stale items surface as stale_candidate_signal rather than disappearing.

candidate_items.failure_prevented: Long-horizon replay coverage gap recurring with no candidate ever closed and no MET signal naming the staleness.
candidate_items.signal_improved: EVL has a tracked candidate item with explicit closure conditions and stale_after window.
